title: Ludacris
description: The aim of this mod is to enhance your Minecraft experience by adding new content based around weaponry. Currently the mod adds, new swords, knives, katanas, and broadswords into the game along with emerald, copper, and crimson (nether) iron weapons.
body:
The aim of this mod is to enhance your Minecraft experience by 
adding new content based around weaponry. Currently the mod 
adds, new swords, knives, katanas, and broadswords into the game along with emerald, and copper weapons. 

This mod also adds a new material Crimson Iron which can be found in the nether to create new weapons, tools, and armor.



All weapons are included in the gallery. 

Supported mod loaders: Forge
